items.title: Krispy Kreme (DNUT) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
items.description: Shares of doughnut chain Krispy Kreme (NASDAQ:DNUT) jumped 2.6% in the afternoon session after the stock's positive momentum continued as Morgan Stanley highlighted the company as a top performer in the restaurant sector, and news emerged of a major sponsorship deal with NASCAR.

items.title: Here's How Procter & Gamble Looks Ahead of Q1 Earnings Release
items.description: PG's innovation and cost-saving focus drive steady organic growth, even as inflation and Greater China pressures weigh on margins.

items.title: Earnings live: General Motors and GE raise guidance, Coca-Cola stock rises on earnings beat
items.description: Third quarter earnings season is ramping up, and analysts expect S&P 500 companies grew their profits by 8% during the quarter.

items.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Tesla, Netflix, Procter & Gamble, Coca-Cola, RTX and IBM
items.description: Zacks highlights Tesla, Netflix, Procter & Gamble, Coca-Cola, RTX and IBM as global markets brace for a data-heavy week amid U.S. shutdown woes and renewed trade tensions.

items.title: Inflation Data; Intel and Tesla Earnings: What to Watch This Week
items.description: The U.S. government shutdown continues, but investors won't be completely starved for economic data. Friday brings a delayed look at September’s consumer-price index, a key inflation reading that will factor into the Federal Reserve’s next decision on interest rates.
